    Index

    A B C D E G H I L M N O P Q R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    H

    Hard - Class in item.level
    The Hard class represents the most challenging difficulty level for a puzzle.
    Hard(String, List<String>, List<String>) - Constructor for class item.level.Hard
    Constructs a Hard puzzle instance with a specific answer, picture list, and hint list.
    HARD - Enum constant in enum class mode.GameMode
     
    hasHint - Interface in item.usage
    The hasHint interface is designed for puzzle objects that provide progressive clues.
    hasLife - Interface in item.usage
    The hasLife interface defines the core life-management capabilities for entities.
    hearts - Variable in class pane.LifePane
    A list containing the ImageView objects for each heart icon shown on the screen.
    hint - Variable in class item.level.Hard
    A collection of text strings provided as hints to the player during the round.
    hint - Variable in class item.level.Medium
    A collection of text strings provided as hints to the player during the round.
    hintField - Variable in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane.ImageHintBox
    The text field for entering a hint for this image.
    hintTextList - Variable in class pane.GamePane
    A list of Text objects representing the hints displayed beneath each puzzle image.
    hp - Variable in class entity.Player
    The current health points of the player.
